Expression search is parsed from the AST: Expression search is parsed from the AST and translated into SQL with an allowed field list, placeholders, and escaped LIKE patterns.
Expressions are limited to 4096 characte: Expressions are limited to 4096 characters, string literals to 1024 characters, and in arrays to 100 items.
Find calls with unusually large input or: Find calls with unusually large input or output token counts.

For admins, filter by channel name and l: For admins, filter by channel name and log type.
JSON map of group name to fallback confi: JSON map of group name to fallback config. When a group has no available channel, the system tries fallback groups in order. Use pricing_mode "origin" to bill at source group rate, or "target" to bill at serving group rate.

Regex matches, arithmetic, function call: Regex matches, arithmetic, function calls, and field-to-field comparisons are not supported.

Strings use double quotes, numbers are i: Strings use double quotes, numbers are integers, booleans are true or false, and nil can check null values.
Use nil only with == or != to check for: Use nil only with == or != to check for null values.
Use parentheses to group logic, for exam: Use parentheses to group logic, for example not (model_name contains "embedding") && type == 2.

Values are bound as SQL parameters, and: Values are bound as SQL parameters, and LIKE searches escape %, _, and ! characters.

When a group has no available channel, t: When a group has no available channel, the system tries fallback groups in order. Pricing mode determines which group ratio is used for billing.
When enabled, source-group pricing uses: When enabled, source-group pricing uses the user special ratio for the source group if configured; otherwise it uses the source normal ratio.
